events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis: mixed old/new belts on a multi-groove sheave is a matched-set violation — the new belt(s) overload while the stretched old belt(s) slip, causing uneven wear, heat, and vibration. Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: medium`, conditions `non-compliant`/`degraded`, and corrective actions (full matched-set replacement, groove inspection, retensioning per mfr spec).
